steps.title: Find the contrast signal
steps.content: The word “though” signals a contrast: smaller areas were less affected by traffic congestion than very large cities, yet congestion still worsened in those smaller areas over time.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to the data
steps.content:
While the number of hours of traffic delay per commuter per year was always lower in the Allentown-Bethlehem, Pennsylvania area than in the New York City, New York area for each year between 1990 and 2000, the amount of traffic delay rose in both areas during this period. states that the delay was always lower in Allentown‑Bethlehem than in New York City, but it increased in both locations from 1990 to 2000 — matching the “less affected but worsened” pattern.
The other three options either focus on a single value below 20 hours, cite a specific year’s figure, or reverse the size comparison, none of which capture the required contrast.
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
